scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@chaowuqiong/web && npm run build --workspace=@chaowuqiong/backend && npm run build --workspace=@openroom/webuiapps
scripts.install:all: npm install --workspace=@chaowuqiong/web && npm install --workspace=@chaowuqiong/backend && npm install --workspace=@openroom/webuiapps
